entities.name: CROP GENE POOLS
entities.description: The collective genetic diversity of a crop species used for breeding.

entities.name: BENEFICIAL TRAITS
entities.description: Desirable characteristics from wild relatives that can improve crop performance.

entities.name: WILD RELATIVES
entities.description: Non-domesticated species related to crops that serve as sources of genetic diversity.

entities.name: GENETIC RESOURCES
entities.description: Genetic material of plant origin of actual or potential value.

entities.name: INTERSPECIFIC GENE TRANSFER
entities.description: The process of moving genes between different species.

entities.name: BIOTECHNOLOGICAL APPROACHES
entities.description: Technological tools used to enhance the utilization of wild relatives in breeding.

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing the genetic makeup of crops for better yield or quality.

entities.name: PLANT BREEDING
entities.description: The science of changing the traits of plants to produce desired characteristics.
